notes: Remove simpleMode / Power-user gating. The toggle was redundant — unmapped gestures already don't fire, so a global kill switch added a layer of state without buying anything you couldn't do per-gesture in the Gestures picker. Defaults trimmed to the three nobody would be surprised by: 1c=play/pause, 2c=next, 3c=prev. The four that used to be defaulted (hold=mute, lh=enter volume, 1c+h=enter bass, 2c+h=enter treble) now appear under a 'Suggested' header at the top of the action picker so they're one tap away if the user wants them. Removed: simpleMode bool, NVS slot, loadSimpleMode/saveSimpleMode, /api/simplemode endpoint, the Power-user toggle in the Gestures header, the togglePowerUser JS, the simpleMode field in /api/status.
